prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为3966→2488→1951→1889→2821，整体呈前移趋势（2021→2024累计前移约2077名），但2025年出现明显后移，较2024年下降 约932名，基准位次约2821名；该校在广西理科/物理类招生计划：2021年62人、2022年62人、2023年61人、2024年61人、2025年65人；2026年计划49人， 较2025年减少16人（缩招约24.6%），缩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第22名、2022年 第21名、2023年第21名、2024年第20名、2025年第20名、2026年第20名，排名稳居全国前20，属顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（3个事件），涉及PPT 贬低非化工专业、期末考试作弊回应引发质疑、电影争议等，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第66位（一般），短视频曝光量中等偏低；第五 轮学科评估A-及以上共20个学科：化学工程与技术A+、管理科学与工程A+、仪器科学与技术A、光学工程A、动力工程及工程热物理A、土木工程A、城乡规划学A、建筑学A、机械工 程A、水利工程A等，工科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与天津大学优势工 科方向高度契合；广西2026年考生总数约39.2万人，物理类估算约26.4万人，较2025年增加约3800人，竞争略有加剧；天津大学 位于天津市，属北方沿海直辖市，对广西考生而言属于跨省就读，地域偏好中性；该校在广西招生占比约2.2%（2025年），属中等偏低水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大 幅后移的波动特征、2026年计划大幅缩招（-24.6%）带来的竞争加剧效应、广西考生人数小幅增加以及声誉偏负面的轻微抑制作用，预测2026年理科最低位次约2434名，区间2157–2711名。缩招是位次前移（数字减小）的核心驱动，2025年位次后移的惯性及考生增加构成部分对冲。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 3966→2488→1951→1889→2821, showing an overall forward trend (cumulative forward shift of about 2077 places from 2021 to 2024), but a significant backward shift in 2025, dropping about 932 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 2821. The enrollment plan for Tianjin University in Guangxi Science/Physics Category: 62 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 61 in 2024, 65 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 49, a decrease of 16 from 2025 (a reduction of about 24.6%), which is a substantial reduction and significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 22nd in 2021, 21st in 2022, 21st in 2023, 20th in 2024, 20th in 2025, and 20th in 2026 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, consistently among the top 20 nationally, belonging to the top-tier universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (3 incidents), involving PPT belittling non-chemical engineering majors, doubts raised by responses to final exam cheating, and film controversies, which may have a slight dampening effect on application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 66th (average), with moderately low short video exposure. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 20 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A, Optical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A, Civil Engineering A, Urban and Rural Planning A, Architecture A, Mechanical Engineering A, Water Conservancy Engineering A, etc., with strong engineering strength, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Tianjin University's advantageous engineering fields. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Guangxi is about 392,000, with an estimated 264,000 in the Physics Category, an increase of about 3,800 from 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, a northern coastal municipality directly under the central government, which is an inter-provincial study for Guangxi examinees, with neutral regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.2% (2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward fluctuation in 2025 rankings, the intensified competition effect from the substantial enrollment reduction in 2026 (-24.6%), the slight increase in Guangxi examinee numbers, and the slight dampening effect of negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for Science in 2026 is about 2434, with a range of 2157–2711. The enrollment reduction is the core driver for the forward shift (decrease in number), while the inertia of the 2025 backward shift and the increase in examinees partially offset this.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2157–2711, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes as the main choice, with Tier 1 National Future Technology Institute and Electrical and Information Category as reach options, and Tier 3 High-Tech Ship and Ocean Equipment as a safety choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<2157), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 top majors; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>2711), you should mainly consider Tier 3. For History Category examinees, due to very few enrollment slots (only 7), it is recommended to primarily choose the Social Science Experimental Class, supplemented by the Architecture Category.
